commit_message: AI-HANDOFF: DOCUSIGNCOVERAGEBASELINE-20260520-RUN62 ready for ChatGPT review
command_run_exactly_once: RUN62 ran exactly one safe npm run test:units command and did not run any live capture, interactive, destructive, upload, or finalize commands.
tests_run: test:units -> passed; 417 passed, 0 failed, 0 skipped; approximately 16.3 seconds

validation_summary.live_flow_coverage_denominator: 12 high-level stages with partial stages counted as 0.5

key_outcome: RUN62 replaced the Physical Operating Address debug loop with a reporting-only baseline: the repo reliably reaches signer surface and field discovery, cumulative concept coverage stands at 27 of 59 concepts, but the stale May 1 post-toggle bundle still blocks fresh field-local proof for all four business_mailing concepts.
blockers: The Physical Operating Address post-toggle proof lane still has no fresh structure or DOM artifact.
selectedToggleSlot remains null even though guarded-expansion telemetry gets deep into the toggle path.
registered_state still needs target-availability resolution before a meaningful guarded live rerun.
Seven concepts still lack stronger field-local proof, and five generic fallback address concepts remain conservatively unclassified.
uncertainty: The latest generated scorecard and findings are latest-run scoped, so they understate cumulative coverage when read without the ledger.
The Physical Operating Address failure is bounded enough to baseline, but not yet precise enough to claim a clean selected-slot outcome or fresh field-local proof.
next_recommendation: Stop here and use this as the current baseline. If work resumes, the next highest-value run is PHYSICALOPERATINGADDRESSRESOLVER-20260520-RUN63 as a strictly non-live capture-isolation pass for the four business_mailing concepts.
